title: Intensely Smoky Greek Lamb Kebabs
description: A fresh and shattering Greek dish featuring parsley and smoky flavors, perfect for a hangover cure, with ingredients chosen for their ayurvedic tamasic-friendly properties. This dish is cooked over binchotan charcoal for a unique flavor.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan charcoal until it is covered in a thin layer of ash.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers over the binchotan charcoal and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
During the last 2 minutes of cooking, sprinkle the chopped parsley over the lamb.
Remove the skewers from the heat and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb kebabs hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
